hooks.command: $changed = git status --porcelain 2>$null | Where-Object { $_ -match '\.(cs|csproj|slnx)$' }; if (-not $changed) { exit 0 }; if (-not (dotnet tool list -g 2>$null | Select-String 'dotnet-sonarscanner')) { dotnet tool install --global dotnet-sonarscanner | Out-Null }; $token = $env:SONAR_TOKEN; if (-not $token) { Write-Error 'SONAR_TOKEN nao definido'; exit 1 }; dotnet sonarscanner begin /k:'YOUR_PROJECT_KEY' /o:'YOUR_ORGANIZATION' "/d:sonar.token=$token" '/d:sonar.host.url=https://sonarcloud.io'; dotnet build TemplateAPI.slnx; dotnet sonarscanner end "/d:sonar.token=$token"
